description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy modeled after Pikachu, a well-known character from the Pokémon franchise. The toy features a rounded yellow body with two large, upright ears tipped in black, and a pair of small, black eyes with white highlights. Its cheeks are circular and rosy red, and it has a small, smiling mouth. The arms are short and slightly extended forward, while the legs are stubby and positioned beneath the body. The back displays two brown horizontal stripes and a prominent, jagged lightning bolt-shaped tail, which is yellow with a brown base.
description: A soft, yellow Pikachu stuffed toy with black-tipped ears, red cheeks, and a lightning bolt-shaped tail.
description_view_0: Front view showing Pikachu's face, red cheeks, black eyes, and both arms extended forward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, one ear, and the full length of the lightning bolt-shaped tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, two brown stripes, and the base of the tail.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, ear, and the tail's zigzag shape.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is cheerful and friendly, with wide, open eyes and a small, smiling mouth. The red cheeks add to the playful and inviting appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with both arms slightly extended forward and legs positioned beneath the body. The head is upright and the tail is angled outward.
